evals.name: public repo architecture deepwiki
evals.prompt: A user asks: explain the architecture of github.com/fastapi/fastapi using DeepWiki. Describe the workflow and output.
evals.expected_output: The response uses DeepWiki/public repo exploration, focuses on architecture/modules/patterns, summarizes design decisions, and avoids local private-code assumptions.
assertions: The output treats this as public GitHub repository exploration.
The output mentions using DeepWiki or AI-generated repo documentation.
The output focuses on architecture, modules, patterns, or design decisions.
The output returns a structured summary with important areas/files or concepts.
The output avoids claiming local/private repository access is needed for a public repo exploration.

evals.name: boundary library api docs
evals.prompt: A user asks: what are the arguments to the requests.get function? Describe how this repo-exploration skill should respond.
evals.expected_output: The response routes narrow API reference questions to looking-up-docs rather than repository architecture exploration.
assertions: The output says the request is a narrow API reference/docs question.
The output routes to looking-up-docs or official docs lookup.
The output avoids using DeepWiki/repo architecture exploration for a single function signature.
